question.description: 题目正文，可含 markdown 代码块

answer_format.description: 作答控件：text 短答/论述，json 代码或结构化 JSON，choice 选择题

choices.description: answer_format=choice 时必填，2-5 个选项，每项为完整选项文案

choice_mode.description: 选择题单选或多选，默认 single

correct_choice.description: answer_format=choice 且 choice_mode=single 时必填，标准答案字母 A-D（与 choices 展示顺序一致，跳过空项后的紧凑序号）

correct_choices.description: answer_format=choice 且 choice_mode=multiple 时必填，标准答案字母列表如 ["A","C"]
